outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 71 of Middle East conflict — US awaits response from Iran on proposal to end war
outlets.summary: CNN Day 71 liveblog covers Iran's pending response to US 14-point peace proposal, Lebanon strike escalation (39 killed), and Hezbollah Misgav Am drone attack on IDF reservists.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: U.S. strikes two Iranian-flagged ships as tensions rise amid ceasefire
outlets.summary: WaPo reports F/A-18s disabled 2-3 Iranian-linked tankers in the Strait of Hormuz on May 8 after IRGC attack on three US destroyers (Truxtun, Rafael Peralta, Mason). No US casualties; ceasefire framework remains technically intact.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: 'Project Freedom' aimed at wrangling control of Hormuz ends after less than 48 hours
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the abrupt end of Project Freedom — the US Navy escort operation in the Strait of Hormuz that lasted less than 48 hours before Trump paused it. Saudi Arabia's refusal to cooperate was a key factor.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Live Updates: Iran says it will respond to US peace offer 'at the appropriate time'
outlets.summary: Fox frames Iran's tardy response as Tehran defying Trump's peace deadline. Highlights Trump's warning that bombing would resume 'at much higher level.' Notes Israeli military pressure as leverage.

outlets.name: Wall Street Journal (US News syndication)
outlets.headline: Israel Built and Defended a Secret Base in Iraq for Iran War, WSJ Reports
outlets.summary: WSJ exclusive reveals Israel operated covert military base in Iraq's western desert during Iran air campaign — including SAR teams for downed pilots. Earlier strikes killed 1 Iraqi soldier; Iraq UN complaint had blamed US.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war day 72: Tehran yet to reply to US plan; Israel bombs Lebanon
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Day 72 liveblog covers Iran's formal response delivered via Pakistan, IRGC 'missiles locked' threats, UK destroyer announcement, Qatar warnings to Iran, and ongoing Lebanon escalation.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: US Awaits Iran Answer After Hormuz Clashes Strain Ceasefire
outlets.summary: Bloomberg covers Iran's pending response to 14-point peace proposal as Hormuz clashes continued through May 8. Markets remain volatile; oil weekly losses on deal hopes balanced against Friday escalation.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: U.S., Iran no closer to ending war as Qatari tanker sails toward Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: CNBC reports US-Iran no closer to ending war as Qatari tanker (LNG) sails toward Hormuz with insurance question marks. May 10: tanker successfully crosses — first transit in days.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: May 9: Qatari PM meets with Rubio, Witkoff in Miami as Doha mediates US-Iran talks
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog covers Qatari PM meeting Rubio and Steve Witkoff in Miami as Doha steps up mediation. Israel awaits Iran response; IDF strikes 85+ Hezbollah targets in Lebanon; Hezbollah Misgav Am drone strike.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: U.S. and Iran exchange fire but Trump says cease-fire still in effect
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports US-Iran fire exchange in Hormuz May 7-8. Trump calls strikes 'love tap' and says ceasefire 'still in effect.' Israel's security establishment remains opposed to emerging deal.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF reservists wounded by Hezbollah explosive drone at Misgav Am
outlets.summary: JPost covers Hezbollah drone strike at Misgav Am in northern Israel — 3 IDF reservists wounded (1 seriously). Second drone hit Shlomi helicopter pad. Both used fiber-optic guidance.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: May 9: Iran reaffirms its red lines, vowing decisive response to any new US attack in Persian Gulf
outlets.summary: Press TV covers IRGC declarations that missiles and drones are 'locked on American targets.' Frames Iran's response as principled red lines defending sovereignty against US 'reckless military adventure.'

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Israel built secret Iraq base for Iran war — WSJ
outlets.summary: Iran International (opposition outlet) covers WSJ exclusive on Israel's secret Iraq desert base for Iran air operations. Frames as betrayal of Iraqi sovereignty and US complicity through cover.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iranian forces strike US vessels in swift retaliation for tanker attack: Top military command
outlets.summary: Press TV frames May 7 Hormuz exchange as Iranian retaliation for US strike on Iranian oil tanker near Jask port. Claims significant damage to US destroyers (disputed by Pentagon).
